{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Ozriel’s marble
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ozriel’s marble]] contains a hole in the world suspended inside it.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12">''Reaper'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ozriel]]'s records were hidden among [[Eithan]]'s family for hundreds of generations.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
